New York is one of the most visited cities in the entire United States of America.

Los Angeles has a metropolitan population of approximately 13 million people today.
Buckingham Palace, London SW1A 1AA, is the official London residence of the King.

The White House at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue serves as the US presidential residence.
Our London office is at 55 Baker Street, W1U 8EW — open Monday through Friday.
North America's largest city by population is Mexico City with 22 million residents.
San Francisco rental prices average over $3,500 per month for a one-bedroom flat.
The London Eye is located on the South Bank, SE1 7PB — open daily until 9 PM.
Pacific Ocean covers approximately 165 million square kilometres of Earth's surface.
New Zealand's capital city Wellington sits on the southern tip of the North Island.
West End theatres are mainly concentrated around Shaftesbury Avenue and Piccadilly.
South America has 12 sovereign nations, with Brazil being by far the largest one.
East End of London was historically a densely populated working-class industrial area.
United Kingdom population exceeds 67 million people according to latest ONS figures.
Las Vegas Boulevard, also known as The Strip, stretches 4.2 miles through Nevada.
Monday morning traffic on Central London roads is typically severely congested early.
The Atlantic Ocean separates the continents of Europe and Africa from the Americas.
